narrative:
Precinct Harrison (precinct in Muskingum County) has 963 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
